title: galium viscosum var. glomeratum
intro: Galium viscosum var. glomeratum, also known as sticky galium or sticky bedstraw, is a perennial herb in the bedstraw family (Galium spp.) native to North America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe wounds and reduce pain. The health benefits of Galium viscosum var. glomeratum include its ability to treat conditions such as eczema, acne, and digestive issues, as well as its use as a diuretic to help reduce fluid retention. Herbal preparations of Galium viscosum var. glomeratum include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
